# Amethyst Healing Rooms

> Reiki, sound healing and community in Cleckheaton, West Yorkshire. Run by Janet Clifford, Usui Reiki Master Teacher, sound healer and shamanic practitioner.

## About

Amethyst Healing Rooms is a healing practice founded by Janet Clifford in Cleckheaton, West Yorkshire (BD12 7HG). Janet's mission is to open people to an awareness of their own energy and the love that connects us all. She works intuitively, drawing on crystals, tuning forks and the shamanic drum as the energy calls for them.

Janet holds the Usui Reiki Master Teacher qualification and teaches reiki at all three levels. She also facilitates monthly community gatherings — reiki shares, sound healing groups and shamanic drumming circles.

## Practitioner

- **Name:** Janet Clifford
- **Qualifications:** Usui Reiki Master Teacher (Third Degree / Shinpiden)
- **Specialisms:** Reiki healing, sound healing (crystal bowls, gong, tuning forks), shamanic drumming, distant healing, Usui Reiki training
- **Location:** Cleckheaton, West Yorkshire, England

## Sessions & Services

### Reiki Healing (1:1)
A deeply relaxing session channelling universal life energy. Janet works intuitively — crystals, tuning forks or the shamanic drum may be included depending on what arises. No two sessions are the same.

### Reiki and Sound Healing (1:1)
Combines reiki with therapeutic sound. Tuning forks calibrated to specific frequencies, crystal bowls and gong work alongside the reiki energy to release what is held and restore balance.

### Meditation and Sound Healing (Group)
Small group sessions of up to six people. Crystal singing bowls and gong create a soundscape the body surrenders into. No prior experience needed.

### Monthly Sound Healing Group
Open community sessions in the local area of West Yorkshire. No booking required. No experience needed.

### Monthly Shamanic Drumming Circle
Monthly drumming circles in the local area. The drum is one of the oldest healing modalities. No experience needed.

### Distant Healing
Reiki delivered remotely through focused intention. The recipient relaxes at home and receives the energy exactly as they would in the same room.

## Reiki Training (Usui System)

| Level | Japanese Name | Description | Price |
|-------|--------------|-------------|-------|
| Level 1 | Shoden (The Beginning) | Foundation attunement. History, principles, hand positions, self-healing. One-day course. | £100 |
| Level 2 | Okuden (The Inner Teachings) | Sacred symbols, distance healing, intuitive working. | £150 |
| Level 3 | Shinpiden (Mystery Teaching / Master Level) | Usui Master symbol, Master self-empowerment meditations, how to perform attunements and teach others. Two-day course. | £250 |

Training is delivered in small groups (maximum four). Janet honours each student's own pace — there is no pressure to advance between levels.

## Community

Amethyst Healing Rooms hosts a growing tribe of practitioners and seekers:

- **Monthly Reiki Share** — A circle where trained reiki practitioners give and receive. Open to anyone with reiki training at any level.
- **Sound Healing Group** — Open monthly community gathering. Crystal bowls and gong.
- **Shamanic Drumming Circle** — Open monthly community gathering. No experience needed.
